goals.description: Complete the reading analysis section now to ensure I don't look like I'm dropping the ball on my teammates tonight.
goals.rationale: My value system is built on deep loyalty to my team. Seeing them struggle or failing because I didn't finish means losing that trust, which hurts me more than the exhaustion. Since I've already worked for hours today and only reached 3% of the reading, dragging this out would be disrespectful to our shared effort. I need to cross this finish line quickly to secure my standing with them, even if it means sacrificing some sleep later.

goals.rationale: Once I've secured my reputation with the professor and ensured I won't let down my teammates, my focus shifts entirely to preserving our close relationship. I want to arrive at the meal feeling rested enough to give them my full attention, rather than being drained by unfinished work. This ensures the connection feels meaningful and not just another obligation.
